changelog: ACTUAL CRASH FIX (DEV ONLY): The Sports section was triggering an ANR (main-thread hang) — not a Java exception, which is why crash reports never made it to the server. Root cause: the channel-name fuzzy matcher was running ~1.6 MILLION regex operations (5,000 channels × 160 games × 2 normalize passes) inside a Compose `remember{}` block, which executes on the main UI thread. Once the main thread blocked >5 s, the OS SIGKILL'd the process, bypassing every Java handler.

Fix has three parts: (1) channel matcher now caches normalized names in a ChannelIndex built ONCE per playlist; (2) all matching runs on Dispatchers.Default via `produceState`, so the main thread stays responsive; (3) first focus on the Sports page now lands on the first league pill ('All'), which always exists, instead of the first card (which doesn't exist while data loads — that's why the rail was 'auto-opening' before, focus was drifting to the leftmost focusable when the unattached card requester failed silently).
Marked mandatory:true so devices stuck on the broken v1.44.0/1.44.1 get force-updated out of the crash loop.
